title: Sirloin Steak with Indian Spices
description: A flavorful sirloin steak with a blend of Indian spices, perfect for a quick dinner. Pair it with a side of roasted vegetables for a well-rounded meal.
instructions: Season the sirloin steaks with salt, black pepper, and a mix of garam masala, cumin, and smoked paprika
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Sear the sirloin steaks for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they reach your desired level of doneness
Transfer the steaks to a plate and let them rest for 5 minutes
Serve the sirloin steaks hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired
